findings.title: Required bare bun test CI gate fails from the reviewed worktree
findings.description: The ticket requires CI to run bun test plus tsc --noEmit, and .github/workflows/ci.yml runs bare bun test. Re-running bun test from the reviewed worktree exits 1 because the safety-hook approval POC tests construct ApprovalGateServer with port 0 and Bun.serve fails to start it, causing three beforeAll failures. This means the blocking CI gate is not green.

findings.title: Full-suite green evidence is contradicted by the reviewed worktree
findings.description: The archived full-suite green log claims bun test passes with 102 passing tests and 0 failures, and gates.json marks that blocking gate passed. A fresh bun test run in the reviewed worktree fails before completing with the port 0 ApprovalGateServer failures. The red-before-green pair for the CI full-suite gate is therefore not reproducible from the delivered state.
